title: Iran Threatens Region-Wide Infrastructure 'Obliteration' As Trump's 48-Hour Ultimatum Ticks Down, Mass Casualties In Southern Israel
summary:
Iran Threatens Region-Wide Infrastructure 'Obliteration' As Trump's 48-Hour Ultimatum Ticks Down, Mass Casualties In Southern Israel

            Summary


	Iran vows regional and US infrastructure will be "irreversibly destroyed" in response to Trump's 48-hour timeline to open Hormuz or else Iranian power plants will be obliterated.
	
	
	Iran announces imposition a $2 million transit fee on 'non-enemy' ships wishing to transit strait.
	
	
	Unprecedented damage and many dozens of casualties in I
summary_ko: 이란과 미국의 긴장 관계가 높아지면서 중동 지역의 인프라가 파괴될 수 있는 위험이 증가하고 있습니다. 이는 글로벌 에너지 시장에 큰 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.

title: Trump Warns Tehran To "Fully Open" Hormuz Or Face 'Obliteration' As Iran-Israel Trade Nuke-Plant Strikes
summary:
Trump Warns Tehran To "Fully Open" Hormuz Or Face 'Obliteration' As Iran-Israel Trade Nuke-Plant Strikes

            Summary


	Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power-plants if Hormuz is not open and safe within 48 hours
	
	
	Natanz nuclear site attacked: Iran says "no nuclear radiation" detected, even as attacks on core sites like Isfahan nuclear facilities signal clear escalation despite earlier Trump signals of maybe "winding down."
	
	
	Iran has responded by targeting Israel's Dimona
summary_ko: 트럼프 대통령이 이란에 호르무즈 해협을 개방하지 않으면 파괴할 것이라고 위협했습니다. 이는 글로벌 에너지 시장에 큰 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.

title: Earendil Labs, an AI-powered drugmaker, hauls in $787M
summary: The hefty funding will support a U.S. and China-based startup that’s amassed a pipeline of nearly 20 drugs and formed two lucrative partnerships with Sanofi.
summary_ko: AI 기반 의약품 개발사 Earendil Labs가 787M 달러를 유치

title: A biotech VC sees early signs of a turnaround for startups
summary: After a lengthy downturn, renewed optimism is building among young drugmakers and their backers as a new funding wave takes shape, said Santé Ventures’ Omar Khalil.
summary_ko: 바이오테크 벤처 캐피탈은 바이오테크 스타트업의 전환기를 예상합니다. 이는 새로운 자금 조달 물결이 형성되고 있음을 시사합니다.

title: China-rooted AI biotech Earendil Labs raises $787M ahead of possible IPO
summary:
The US-headquartered, China-rooted biotech Earendil Labs said it has raised $787 million in private money, a whopping sum to fund an AI platform that has already produced a pipeline of over 40 drug programs.

 Despite ...
summary_ko: 중국계 AI 바이오텍 기업 Earendil Labs는 787만 달러를 투자받았습니다. 이는 AI를 이용한 신약 개발에 대한 유망한 투자입니다.

title: Novartis pays $2B to land a startup’s breast cancer drug
summary: Acquiring a unit of privately held Synnovation Therapeutics hands Novartis a prospect that might improve on medicines that, like its own Piqray, target tumors driven to growth by PIK3CA mutations.
summary_ko: Novartis가 스타트업의 유방암 약물 개발을 위해 20억 달러를 지불

title: Lilly’s three-pronged obesity drug hits goal in large diabetes trial
summary: Retatrutide, a possible advance on GLP-1 drugs like Zepbound, significantly cut blood sugar and body weight in the study, a sign it might be similarly impactful against obesity.
summary_ko: 엘리 릴리의 레트라튜드는 대규모 당뇨병 임상시험에서 목표를 달성했습니다. 이는 레트라튜드가 비만 치료에 효과적일 수 있음을 시사합니다.

title: RBC: Revolution, Xenon, Arrowhead among top takeover targets
summary: As part of a larger review, analyst Leonid Timashev identified 13 companies that could see deal interest as well as more than half a dozen poised to be potential buyers.
summary_ko: RBC는 레볼루션, 제논, 애로헤드 등이 인수 대상이 될 수 있다고 분석했습니다. 이는 바이오테크 산업에서 인수 합병이 증가할 수 있음을 시사합니다.
